questions.text: When you're communicating with family in Tennessee or Spanish-speaking locals in Mexico — what's your language preference? Do you switch entirely based on who you're talking to, mix languages in conversation, or have a specific approach to code-switching?

When it comes to your personal finances — beyond day-to-day spending — do you have specific financial goals you're actively working toward (like a savings target, buying property, financial independence), or is it more of a 'keep things flexible and see where life takes you' approach?

When you're looking to discover new podcasts or content — aside from the ones you already listen to — what's your method for finding good recommendations? Do you ask friends, browse specific platforms, rely on algorithms, or have other ways you discover new shows?

Do you have any interest in creative hobbies beyond tech — like drawing, painting, playing an instrument, writing, or making things with your hands? If you ever wanted to explore creative expression outside of work, what's appeal you the most?

What's your philosophy on sleep — do you have specific routines or habits around winding down, optimizing your sleep environment, or tracking sleep quality? Or is it more of a 'just sleep when you're tired' thing?
